metadata.title: Sneaking a Quick Flank to Secure a Clean 2v1 Win in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how a well-timed flank and sharp aim turn a tough 2v1 into a smooth win. What’s your go-to move for clutch rounds?
Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!
